title: Thai Crispy Savory Bites
description: Crispy fried bites with a savory portuguese crumble filling, inspired by Thai cuisine.

ingredients.name: Savory filling
ingredients.notes: mix of portuguese crumble, crispy chips, and spices

instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
2. In a bowl, mix the savory filling ingredients.
3. Make small balls with the filling and coat them with the beaten egg.
4. Roll the egg-coated balls in the crushed chips to coat.
5. Fry the coated balls in batches until golden brown.
6. Drain the fried bites on paper towels.
7. Serve the Thai crispy savory bites hot and enjoy!
